content.en:
"Endless Lord, this is it!"

The white-bearded old man took Ye Tian to a forest.

This forest is integrated, it seems to be a real forest, but as a half-step eternal controller, Ye Tian can judge something.

"A special life similar to the Black Silent Sea!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Such special beings that even the Eternal Masters could not kill them, except for the most top-notch Eternal Masters.

Ye Tian naturally couldn't kill such a special life, but he only needed to take the white-bearded old man through this forest.

"White-bearded old man, come with me!"

Ye Tian said.

"Hmm!"

The white-bearded old man followed Ye Tian and shuttled into the forest in an instant.

This piece of time and space is all covered by the life of this forest.

The moment they entered, the forest launched an attack on Ye Tian and them.

Airplanes!!!!

Countless branches turned into tentacles to attack, and each tentacle contained incomparably powerful power.

Ye Tian immediately unleashed three thousand void hands and a thousand true bodies, colliding with the forest life.

Rumble!!!

Three thousand Void Hands shattered tentacles one by one, shattering space-time and space.19

Ye Tian took the white-bearded old man to shuttle quickly, but this piece of time and space was under the control of the other party, and the distance of time and space became extremely distant.

"Extreme Dao Sky Slashing Sword!"

The sword qi containing terrifying power shattered countless time and space, slashed countless forest tentacles, and even slashed into the land of this forest, directly piercing this area.

However, soon everything was back to normal.

Ye Tian's attack couldn't hurt this forest at all, which was expected by Ye Tian.

However, Ye Tian still had to attack, dodging the attack by attacking, so as to pass through this forest.

Ahead.

More and more forest branches form a moat.

It was a forest wall that blocked this plane, and it had to be broken down before it could be penetrated.

The white-bearded old man was not idle, he was also helping.

But his attack landed on the wooden wall of the forest, and it had no effect other than causing a little ripple in time and space.

"Endless Lord, I can't break this barrier, it's up to you to take action. "

The white-bearded old man said helplessly.

"I'll do it!"

Ye Tian used his full strength to use the Extreme Dao Void Slashing Sword and bombarded this wooden barrier.

Click!

The wall of the wooden barrier was shattered, and Ye Tian took the white-bearded old man through quickly.

They're halfway there.

Next, Ye Tian used various time control techniques, showing unparalleled strength, no matter how this forest attacked Ye Tian, he couldn't help him.

After a while, Ye Tian led the white-bearded old man through the forest.

During the whole process, neither of them was injured.

"It's here!"

The white-bearded old man was extremely excited.

The forest, which had left him helpless for countless years, is now as simple as that!

Before coming, he was even prepared to suffer a heavy blow or even fall, even if he was lucky enough to pass, he thought that he and Ye Tian would inevitably be injured.

But now, they are not hurt at all.

It's not that they're lucky, it's that Ye Tian's strength is too strong.

"I still underestimated the strength of the Endless Lord, I didn't expect that the half-step Eternal Master would be able to exert such terrifying strength. "

The white-bearded old man said secretly.

In this battle, Ye Tian consumed some of his strength.

So, after he rested for a while, and after all his strength had recovered, he moved forward with the white-bearded old man.

They were very careful, and no one knew if there was any danger in the inner perimeter.

Therefore, it is better to be cautious.

As he walked, Ye Tian sensed that there were abundant energy fluctuations underground.

The will probes, and soon a vein fell into Ye Tian's perception.

"It's a vein of virtual silver!"

The white-bearded old man was shocked.

Void Silver, a very scarce material in the Boundary River, can be used to create Realm Soldiers.

Ordinary weapons are of no use to the Eternal Master, not even the Superior Eternal Arcana, like toys.

As a result, after countless years of research by many Eternal Masters, they have succeeded in crafting the Realm Master.

Of course, if you want to create a way to control the Boundary, you have to create a method of mastering the Boundary, and each method of mastering the Realm Soldier is different, and the materials required are different.

But the Void Silver is a resource that many Realm Masters need, and even many Eternal Masters have been acquiring Void Silver for a long time.

If a piece of Void Silver is measured in Boundary River Coins, it is 10,000 Boundary River Coins.

And here is a vein of Void Silver, the value of which is even the heart of the Eternal Master!

"Old man with white beard, let's be half of us. "

Ye Tian said.

The white-bearded old man shook his head, "You are seventy percent, I am thirty percent, if it weren't for you, I wouldn't be able to enter here." "

"Good!"

Ye Tian was not polite.

The Void Silver is indeed useful to him, and he also wants to create a Realm Master, and so much Void Silver can be traded with an Eternal Master in exchange for the method of mastering the Realm Soldier.

Therefore, he needed more than enough silver.

So, the two of them began to dig this phantom vein.

It didn't take long for this vein to be dug up by them, and seventy percent of it fell into Ye Tian's hands, and the other thirty percent belonged to the white-bearded old man.

As soon as they came in, they were very happy to have such a big harvest.

But what the white-bearded old man longs for most is a treasure that can help him attack the eternal master and increase the success rate, if he obtains that kind of treasure, only 570 is a real great opportunity.

Along.

Ye Tian and the white-bearded old man saw many resources, took them one by one, and then divided them.

Many of these resources have a great effect on improving the Eternal Will, and if all of them are taken out, Ye Tian even has the hope of raising the Eternal Will to the late Eighth Order.

Moreover, Ye Tian also saw several materials, which could often be used to create a control realm soldier.

"Old man with white beard, I see the building. "

Ye Tian suddenly spoke.

The white-bearded old man also looked solemn, because he also saw it.

"Endless Lord, do you want to go over?"

The white-bearded old man asked.

"Let's wait first, we will collect all the resources here, and then send a clone over to take all the resources out of the body, otherwise, the clone will fall here, and if the resources are gone, it will be a big loss." Ye Tian proposed.

"Well, that's a good idea. "

The white-bearded old man agreed.

Then, Ye Tian and the white-bearded old man sent their clones to come again.

Time passed slowly, and after a long time, the clone of the white-bearded old man arrived.

According to the original route, Ye Tian came with the clone of the white-bearded old man and broke through the forest.

Subsequently, the clones met, took the resources with them, returned the way they came, rushed out of this treasure land, and returned to the outside world.

In this way, Ye Tiancai was relieved to approach the building with the white-bearded old man. _
